# knowledge before / after the fix

What the knowledge architecture looked like before the research, and after the fix (EX04 §5.4 — knowledge-level before/after):

| Aspect | Before research | After fix |
|---|---|---|
| Suspect node | unknown — symptom only | `httprange.parser.parse_byte_range` (graph-localized) |
| hot.md | none | points at the localized module + suspect |
